nasb.text: He broke in pieces the sacred pillars and cut down the Asherim and filled their places with human bones.

esv.text: And he broke in pieces the pillars and cut down the Asherim and filled their places with the bones of men.

cnv.text: 他又打碎神柱，砍下亞舍拉，把死人的骨頭布滿那個地方。

ccb.text: 他砸碎神柱，砍倒亚舍拉神像，用死人骨头填满那些地方。
